message:
test(ft-xbnl0.2.4): mpsc::Receiver::recv observes pre-cancel (tick 422)

Pins cx-cancel observation on the asupersync mpsc receiver — the final
core channel primitive in the cancel-matrix. With live senders (no
disconnect), empty channel, and a pre-cancelled cx, `rx.recv(&cx)` must
return `Err(RecvError::Cancelled)` promptly.

Unlike oneshot / broadcast which have runtime_compat wrappers, mpsc is
re-exported directly (`pub use asupersync::channel::mpsc`) so the test
exercises the asupersync primitive through runtime_compat's public
re-export. Cancel semantics are surfaced by asupersync's `poll_recv`
short-circuit:

    if cx.checkpoint().is_err() {
        Poll::Ready(Err(RecvError::Cancelled))
    }

Test shape (matches ticks 419-421):
- `(tx, mut rx) = mpsc::channel::<u64>(4)` — keep `_tx` alive
- Pre-cancel cx via `cx.cancel_with(User, ...)`
- Wrap `rx.recv(&cx)` in 2 s outer safety-net timeout
- Assert elapsed < 1 s AND `Err(RecvError::Cancelled)` specifically

Observed locally: test returns in under 10 ms — cx-checkpoint
short-circuit fires on the very first poll.

Channel + sync primitive × signal-kind matrix (now complete for all
long-lived wait primitives):

| Primitive                      | Budget        | Direct cancel    |
|--------------------------------|---------------|------------------|
| sleep_with_cx                  | ✓ tick 382    | ✗ documented     |
| timeout_with_cx                | ✓ tick 383    | ✗ documented     |
| yield_now_with_cx              | (n/a)         | ✓ tick 418       |
| oneshot_recv_with_cx           | (transitive)  | ✓ tick 419       |
| broadcast_recv_with_cx         | (transitive)  | ✓ tick 420       |
| Semaphore::acquire_with_cx     | (transitive)  | ✓ tick 421       |
| mpsc::Receiver::recv           | (transitive)  | ✓ tick 422       |

mpsc is heavily used across `ipc.rs` for shutdown signals and
subscription plumbing — pinning cx-cancel guards those patterns.

Check script Run 6/6 filter extends to include `mpsc_recv_with_cx`.
Test counts:

  1/6 HTTP client       : 34
  2/6 TLS               : 45
  3/6 Regression guards :  3
  4/6 Metrics server    :  3
  5/6 Web server        :  2
  6/6 runtime_compat    :  8  (+1 from tick 422)
  total                 : 95

Full check script passes locally via fork bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,14 +15,15 @@
 #   4. Metrics server cx-first family (3) — metrics_server_start_with_cx_*
 #      Pre-cancel / mid-flight-cancel / happy path.
 #   5. Web server cx pre-cancel (1) — web_server_with_cx_*
-#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (7) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
+#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (8) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
 #      + yield_now_with_cx + oneshot_recv_with_cx + broadcast_recv_with_cx
-#      + semaphore_acquire_with_cx
+#      + semaphore_acquire_with_cx + mpsc_recv_with_cx
 #      sleep_with_cx + timeout_with_cx budget-observation tests (ticks
 #      382/383), yield_now_with_cx cancel-checkpoint + happy-path tests
 #      (tick 418), oneshot_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 419),
 #      broadcast_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 420),
-#      Semaphore::acquire_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 421).
+#      Semaphore::acquire_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 421),
+#      mpsc::Receiver::recv pre-cancel test (tick 422).
 #
 # Exit code 0 on all passing; non-zero on any failure.
 #
@@ -126,7 +127,7 @@ run_test "Run 6/6: runtime_compat primitive contracts (budget + cancel observati
     -p frankenterm-core \
     --features asupersync-runtime \
     --lib \
-    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_with_cx
+    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_with_cx mpsc_recv_with_cx
 
 echo
 echo "=============================================================="
